# Purpose
This C header file is part of a software project that deals with Bluetooth services. It defines a preprocessor macro `UNITTEST_BT_PERSISTENT_STORAGE_VERSION` with a value of `1`, which likely indicates the version of the unit test for Bluetooth persistent storage. The file includes the header `bluetooth_persistent_storage_v1_impl.h`, which suggests that it relies on the implementation details provided in that file for Bluetooth persistent storage functionality.
